item.title: What makes Crystal Awards better for corporate recognition events?
item.author: Amelia Brown
item.content:encoded: Crystal Awards, Acrylic Awards online, Custom perpetual plaques, and Personalized Clocks are modern recognition products designed to celebrate achievements, milestones, and excellence in a professional and meaningful way. These awards combine elegance, customization, and durability to create memorable appreciation pieces for individuals and organizations.These recognition items are widely used in corporate events, schools, sports ceremonies, and special celebrations where honoring performance and contribution is important. Each product type offers a different style and material, allowing organizations to choose according to budget, design preference, and occasion.• Crystal Awards, Acrylic Awards online, Custom perpetual plaques, Personalized Clocks provide recognition, motivation, branding value, durability, and elegant presentation for corporate and personal achievement celebrationsCrystal Awards are known for their premium and luxurious appearance, often used for high-level corporate recognition or special achievements. Acrylic Awards online offer a modern and cost-effective alternative with flexible design options and quick customization. Custom perpetual plaques are designed for long-term recognition, often used in offices, institutions, and award walls where names are added over time. Personalized Clocks combine functionality with appreciation, making them practical gifts that also serve as a lasting reminder of achievement.The process of ordering and creating these awards is simple and structured to ensure quality and customization:Selection of award type such as Crystal Awards, Acrylic Awards online, Custom perpetual plaques, or Personalized ClocksChoosing design template, material, size, and style based on occasion and budgetAdding personalization details such as names, logos, messages, and achievement titlesDesign preview and approval to ensure accuracy and satisfactionProduction, quality check, and secure delivery of the final customized awardThis process ensures that every award is carefully crafted and tailored to meet specific requirements. Attention to detail in design and personalization makes each piece unique and meaningful.When comparing these recognition products, it becomes easier to understand their differences and ideal usage:Product Type Material Purpose Best For Key Advantage Crystal Awards Crystal glass Premium recognition Corporate awards, high achievements Luxurious and elegant appearance Acrylic Awards online Acrylic material Modern recognition Events, schools, businesses Affordable and customizable Custom perpetual plaques Metal/wood/acrylic mix Long-term recognition display Offices, institutions Continuous name additions Personalized Clocks Wood, metal, acrylic Functional gifting award Employee appreciation, milestones Practical and memorable giftEach of these award types serves a unique role in recognition and appreciation. Crystal Awards are often chosen for top-tier honors where elegance and prestige matter most. Acrylic Awards online are popular for their versatility and modern design options, making them suitable for various events and organizations. Custom perpetual plaques are ideal for ongoing recognition systems, such as employee of the month or donor recognition boards. Personalized Clocks combine appreciation with utility, making them a thoughtful and long-lasting gift.Organizations often choose a mix of these awards depending on the event type and level of achievement being recognized. For example, high achievers may receive Crystal Awards, while team members or participants may receive Acrylic Awards online or Personalized Clocks. Custom perpetual plaques are commonly placed in office spaces or institutions to continuously honor contributors over time.These recognition products also play an important role in motivation and employee engagement. When individuals are publicly recognized through well-designed awards, it increases morale, encourages productivity, and builds a positive work culture. The visual appeal of Crystal Awards and Acrylic Awards online adds prestige to the recognition moment, making it more memorable.Customization is one of the strongest features of these products. Organizations can add logos, motivational quotes, event names, and individual achievements to create a personalized experience. This level of detail transforms a simple award into a meaningful keepsake that recipients value for years.Durability is another important factor. Crystal Awards offer long-lasting clarity and shine, while Acrylic Awards online provide lightweight yet sturdy alternatives. Custom perpetual plaques are designed for continuous updates, ensuring long-term usability. Personalized Clocks not only last but also remain useful in daily life, keeping the memory of achievement alive.Benefits of Custom Recognition and Award Solutions Using Crystal Awards, Acrylic Awards online, Custom perpetual plaques, and Personalized Clocks together creates a complete recognition system that supports appreciation across different levels and occasions.One of the biggest benefits is emotional impact. Receiving a well-designed award creates a strong sense of achievement and appreciation. It reinforces positive behavior and encourages continued excellence. Crystal Awards are especially effective for creating a sense of prestige, while Acrylic Awards online offer accessible recognition for larger groups.Another key benefit is branding opportunity. Companies often use these awards to display their logo, colors, and messaging, strengthening brand identity during corporate events. Custom perpetual plaques are particularly useful for maintaining long-term visibility of achievements within an organization.These awards also support event professionalism. Whether it is a corporate ceremony, school function, or sports event, presenting high-quality awards like Personalized Clocks or Crystal Awards enhances the overall experience and adds value to the occasion.Additionally, they offer flexibility in design and budgeting. Acrylic Awards online provide cost-effective solutions for large events, while Crystal Awards are suitable for premium recognition. This allows organizations to balance quality and cost effectively.Overall, Crystal Awards, Acrylic Awards online, Custom perpetual plaques, and Personalized Clocks form a complete recognition ecosystem that helps celebrate achievements in a meaningful, elegant, and lasting way.

item.title: Why are Engraved Crystal Awards popular for recognition ceremonies?
item.author: Amelia Brown
item.content:encoded:
Engraved Crystal Awards are premium recognition pieces designed to honor excellence, dedication, and success in a sophisticated and memorable way. Their timeless appearance and customizable engraving options make them a popular choice for corporate, community, religious, and public service recognition programs.Recognition plays an important role in motivating individuals and celebrating accomplishments. Among the many award options available today, Engraved Crystal Awards stand out because of their elegance, durability, and ability to showcase personalized messages. Whether presented at a corporate event, a community gathering, or a special ceremony, crystal awards create lasting memories for recipients.Organizations often choose Engraved Crystal Awards because they combine beauty with prestige. The clarity and brilliance of crystal enhance the visual appeal of engraved names, achievements, and company logos. These awards are suitable for employee recognition programs, leadership awards, retirement celebrations, volunteer appreciation events, and milestone achievements.Custom Engraved Plaques are another popular option for recognizing excellence. These plaques allow organizations to create personalized awards tailored to specific accomplishments. Available in various materials and finishes, they offer flexibility while maintaining a professional appearance. Businesses, schools, nonprofit organizations, and government agencies frequently use Custom Engraved Plaques to honor achievements and commemorate special occasions.One of the advantages of personalized recognition products is their ability to communicate appreciation in a meaningful way. A customized message can transform a simple award into a treasured keepsake that recipients proudly display for years.• Popular uses include employee recognition, retirement celebrations, volunteer appreciation, leadership awards, academic achievements, Religious Awards ceremonies, and Firefighter Awards presentations.Many organizations value the emotional impact of recognition programs. When individuals receive a professionally crafted award, they feel acknowledged for their efforts and contributions. This sense of appreciation often encourages continued dedication and engagement within the organization.The process of creating personalized awards is designed to ensure accuracy and quality.Select the award style and material.Choose the engraving details, including names and messages.Review and approve the design proof.Complete the production and engraving process.Deliver the finished award for presentation.Religious Awards hold special significance because they recognize spiritual commitment, community service, faith-based leadership, and dedication to religious organizations. Churches, ministries, schools, and faith communities frequently present Religious Awards to honor individuals who demonstrate exceptional service and devotion. These awards help celebrate meaningful contributions while inspiring others to continue serving their communities.Firefighter Awards are equally important because they acknowledge bravery, sacrifice, and commitment to public safety. Firefighters dedicate themselves to protecting lives and property, often placing themselves in challenging situations. Recognizing their service through personalized awards helps express gratitude for their courage and professionalism.
Organizations planning award ceremonies often compare different recognition options before making a decision. The choice between crystal awards and plaques often depends on the event, budget, and recognition goals. Crystal awards are frequently selected for high-profile ceremonies because of their luxurious appearance, while plaques remain a classic and versatile option for many recognition programs.Modern engraving technology has made it possible to create highly detailed designs with exceptional precision. Logos, photographs, text, and decorative elements can all be incorporated into award designs, resulting in unique and personalized recognition pieces. This flexibility allows organizations to align awards with their branding and event themes.Choosing the Right Recognition Awards for Every Occasion Selecting the appropriate award is an important part of creating a successful recognition program. Different occasions call for different styles of awards, and understanding the purpose of the presentation helps ensure the best choice.Engraved Crystal Awards are often preferred for executive recognition, annual achievement ceremonies, and prestigious honors. Their polished appearance communicates excellence and distinction, making them ideal for celebrating major accomplishments. The reflective quality of crystal creates an impressive presentation that captures attention and enhances the significance of the award.Custom Engraved Plaques continue to be a reliable option for organizations seeking a traditional and professional recognition solution. They can be customized for virtually any event and are available in a wide range of styles and finishes. Their versatility makes them suitable for both formal and informal presentations.Religious Awards often feature inspirational messages, meaningful symbols, and personalized engravings that reflect faith and service. These awards are commonly presented during church anniversaries, ministry appreciation events, youth leadership programs, and community outreach initiatives. By recognizing dedication and commitment, these awards strengthen community bonds and encourage continued service.Firefighter Awards serve as powerful symbols of appreciation and respect. Fire departments, municipalities, and community organizations frequently present these awards to recognize years of service, acts of bravery, leadership achievements, and outstanding performance. Personalized engraving adds a meaningful touch that reflects the recipient’s contributions and dedication.A successful recognition program goes beyond simply presenting an award. It creates an opportunity to celebrate achievements, reinforce organizational values, and inspire future excellence. Personalized awards help recipients feel valued while strengthening relationships within teams and communities.Whether selecting Engraved Crystal Awards for prestigious ceremonies, Custom Engraved Plaques for professional recognition, Religious Awards for faith-based service, or Firefighter Awards for public safety heroes, choosing high-quality personalized awards ensures that accomplishments are honored in a meaningful and memorable way. Thoughtfully designed recognition products continue to serve as lasting reminders of dedication, achievement, and excellence long after the ceremony has ended.

item.title: The Two Worlds
item.author: Spiros Tsaconas
item.content:encoded: I am a thinker, a seeker, and a guide. My mission is to help others navigate the intersections of human potential and the emerging world of Artificial Intelligence, through understanding psychology, neuro-linguistic programming, and technology. I aim to empower people to harness their will, transcend limitations, and evolve into their highest selves, by joining me in exploring the powerful union of mind, heart, and machine.. . in order to Build The Bridge, for both of our Worlds.

item.title: Spectre Programming Language
item.author: Navid
item.content:encoded: Why create a new programming language? No programming languages offer the combination of DbC at the language-level and also low-level control over the programs written. Spectre features no garbage collector, opting for a custom-allocator based approach to memory management and ownership, and uses design-by-contract features such as preconditions, postconditions, and type-level invariants, in addition to static trust propagation through the use of verifiably safe and unverifiable functions.Some things built with the Spectre Programming Language:

item.title: Crystal Bracelet for Positive Energy & Timeless Style | NVC Attunements
item.author: Arpita Sharma
item.content:encoded: A crystal bracelet from NVC Attunements is more than just a fashion accessory — it is a beautiful blend of natural energy and modern style. Carefully crafted using genuine crystals, each bracelet is designed to complement your daily look while bringing a calming and positive vibe to your routine. Whether you wear it for its beauty or symbolic meaning, a crystal bracelet adds a unique touch to every outfit.At NVC Attunements, every crystal bracelet is created with attention to detail, comfort, and authenticity. From soft and elegant tones to bold and eye-catching styles, our collection is suitable for everyday wear, gifting, meditation, or personal styling. Each piece is thoughtfully designed to help you express your individuality with natural charm.Our crystal bracelet collection includes a variety of natural stones known for their distinctive appearance and spiritual significance. Many people choose crystal bracelets to promote positivity, confidence, peace, and emotional balance. The timeless design makes these bracelets perfect for both casual and special occasions.Explore the exclusive crystal bracelet collection at NVC Attunements and discover jewelry that feels meaningful, stylish, and personal. Made with premium materials and a human touch, our crystal bracelets are designed for those who appreciate beauty with purpose.

item.title: Title: B=uy Yahoo Account: Best Place for Aged, Bulk & PVA Yahoo Accounts in 2026
item.author: smmpvaio25
item.content:encoded: B=uy Yahoo Account In the evolving digital landscape of 2026, establishing a strong online footprint requires more than just a single email address. When you choose to B=uy Yahoo account packages, you are investing in a versatile tool that powers your marketing, communication, and security strategies. At smmpvaio.com, we understand the high demand for reliable digital assets. Our platform is dedicated to providing high-quality, verified accounts that allow businesses and individuals to scale their operations without the hurdles of manual account creation. Whether you are looking to "sell product" services or manage a massive outreach campaign, our Yahoo accounts are designed to satisfy your most rigorous professional requirements. 🔥 SMMPVAIO – Trusted Digital Accounts Marketplace 🔥 📲 WhatsApp: https://wa.me/+447916688316 📩 Email: smmpvaio@gmail.comhttps://telegram.me/SMMPvaIO Order your favorite products:https://smmpvaio.com/product/B=uy-yahoo-account/🌐 Visit Our Website: 👉🏻👉🏻Show my site : https://smmpvaio.com/ 🛒 Order Your Favorite Products: smmpvaio.com/product/B=uy-yahoo-account/ ✅ Verified Accounts ✅ Instant Delivery ✅ 24/7 Customer Support 🔰B=uy with Confidence from SMMPVAIO – Your Trusted Digital Account Provider. 💠💠💠💠💠🌀🌀💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠🌀🌀💠💠 What is Yahoo Account? A Yahoo account is a comprehensive digital identity that grants you access to one of the most resilient ecosystems on the web. It is not just about Yahoo Mail; it includes integration with Yahoo Finance, News, and Search. When you B=uy Yahoo accounts, you are acquiring a profile that is globally recognized and trusted by almost every third-party service for verification purposes. For developers and marketers, a Yahoo account serves as a "legit" anchor for signing up on social platforms, creating developer profiles, or managing professional newsletters with high deliverability.B=uy Yahoo Accounts For those who need efficiency, the best option is to B=uy Yahoo accounts in pre-verified batches. Instead of spending hours dealing with CAPTCHAs and phone verifications, you can acquire a ready-to-use profile instantly. At smmpvaio.com, we ensure that every account we provide is unique and secure. B=uying these accounts allows you to focus on your core business goals—like marketing and sales—while we handle the technical background of providing stable, functional communication channels.Why B=uy Yahoo Accounts? You might ask, why B=uy Yahoo accounts instead of making them yourself? The answer lies in scalability and trust. Modern platforms have strict limits on how many accounts one IP address can create. By choosing to B=uy, you bypass these restrictions. Furthermore, accounts provided by smmpvaio.com are created using high-quality proxies and unique fingerprints, meaning they have a much higher survival rate than DIY accounts. This is essential for anyone looking to "sell product" listings on marketplaces or manage multiple social media identities simultaneously. How Can I B=uy PVA Yahoo Accounts?If you are wondering how can I B=uy PVA Yahoo accounts, the process at smmpvaio.com is designed to be as simple as possible. PVA stands for Phone Verified Account, which is the gold standard for security and longevity. Visit our website: smmpvaio.com. Select the Yahoo PVA package that fits your needs (Aged or Fresh). Complete the secure checkout process. Receive your login credentials via instant delivery. Our system is streamlined to ensure that you get "cheap" yet premium service with just a few clicks.Why Is It Important to B=uy Yahoo PVA Accounts? It is crucial to understand why is it important to B=uy Yahoo PVA accounts. Non-verified accounts are often flagged by security systems as "bot-like," leading to instant bans or restricted access. A PVA account has been linked to a unique phone number, which signals to Yahoo that the user is a real person. This significantly increases the account's reputation and allows you to use it for high-stakes tasks like business correspondence or recovery for other high-value assets. B=uy Yahoo Accounts PVA in BulkFor large agencies and marketing firms, the ability to B=uy Yahoo accounts PVA in bulk is a game-changer. Managing 100 or 500 accounts manually is impossible, but with our bulk packages, you get a organized list of verified credentials ready for your automated tools or team members. At smmpvaio.com, we offer significant discounts for bulk orders, ensuring that you get the best value for your investment while maintaining a high standard of quality across every single profileWhere Can I B=uy Old PVA Yahoo Accounts? If you are searching for where I can B=uy old PVA Yahoo accounts, look no further than smmpvaio.com. Aged accounts are highly sought after because they have "warmed up" histories. An old PVA account is less likely to trigger security checkpoints when logging in from a new location. We maintain a curated stock of aged accounts that have been preserved specifically for professional use, making us the premier destination for those who need immediate authority and trust in 2026. Why Should I B=uy a Lot of Yahoo Accounts?Many SEO professionals ask, why should I B=uy a lot of Yahoo accounts? The reason is diversification. If you rely on a single account for all your marketing, one strike could end your entire project. By spreading your activity across many accounts, you protect your business. Using multiple accounts allows you to run concurrent email campaigns, post to various forums, and build a massive network of backlinks without drawing suspicion from search engine algorithms.Where Can I B=uy Bulk Yahoo Accounts? When you need volume, you need to know where can I B=uy bulk Yahoo accounts that are actually functional. Many "cheap" providers sell recycled data that dies within days. At smmpvaio.com, we pride ourselves on being a "legit" provider. Every bulk order is fresh, verified, and comes with a replacement guarantee. We provide the "good words" of support that ensure your bulk purchase is a success, not a headachBenefits of Using Yahoo Accounts The benefits of using Yahoo accounts extend beyond simple emailing. Yahoo's ecosystem is incredibly stable and has high trust scores with other platforms like Facebook, LinkedIn, and GitHub. Using a Yahoo account for your business profiles often leads to fewer "suspicious activity" prompts. Additionally, Yahoo's interface is user-friendly and highly compatible with third-party CRM tools, making it an excellent choice for modern digital workflows.B=uy Bulk Yahoo Accounts Choosing to B=uy bulk Yahoo accounts is the most cost-effective way to power your marketing machine. Whether you are doing cold outreach or setting up social media farm accounts, bulk B=uying ensures you always have a backup. At smmpvaio.com, our bulk accounts come with full access, including recovery email details, giving you total control over your digital assets from the moment of purchase. Where to B=uy Yahoo Accounts? If you are still looking for where to B=uy Yahoo accounts, the answer is clearly smmpvaio.com. We have spent years perfecting our account creation and aging process to meet the specific needs of the SEO and SMM community. We don't just sell product; we provide a foundation for your digital success. Our commitment to quality, security, and customer satisfaction makes us the top choice for anyone needing verified Yahoo profiles in 2026.Frequently Asked QuestionsIs it safe to B=uy Yahoo accounts in bulk for my marketing business? Yes, it is perfectly safe to B=uy Yahoo account packages if you use a trusted provider like smmpvaio.com. We ensure that our accounts are created following strict security protocols. When you B=uy in bulk, we provide accounts with unique IPs and fingerprints to ensure they remain stable for your long-term projects. Our goal is to satisfy your business needs with "legit" and durable assets.What is the difference between a normal account and a PVA account? A normal account is just a username and password, whereas a PVA (Phone Verified Account) has been confirmed via a unique mobile number. You should B=uy Yahoo PVA accounts if you want to avoid instant bans. PVA accounts are treated with much higher trust by Yahoo and other platforms, making them the best choice for professional use.How long does it take to receive the accounts after I B=uy? At smmpvaio.com, we value your time. Once you complete your order to B=uy Yahoo accounts, our automated system triggers instant delivery. You will receive a secure file with all login credentials, recovery emails, and instructions immediately, allowing you to start your "sell product" campaigns without waiting.Conclusion Success in the digital world of 2026 requires speed, scale, and reliability. Visit smmpvaio.com now and take the first step toward a more powerful digital future!

item.title: I Think Ruby Isn’t Dynamic Enough…
item.author: kojix2
item.content:encoded:
This article is a subjective personal essay, not a rigorous technical argument.For the past few years, I have become something of a Crystal believer. Crystal is a language that has achieved high performance by accepting strong constraints. Ruby, by contrast, is a language whose strength lies in dynamic qualities that Crystal cannot have. Looking at recent movements in Ruby from the perspective of a Crystal believer, I sometimes find myself thinking: “That is an area Crystal people have been digging into for years, and Ruby’s real strengths are not really there, are they…?” I have not been able to share this feeling with many people, which has been frustrating.I myself only really understand Ruby and Crystal, so I have not had much confidence in what I have been thinking, and have spent my time in a somewhat vague state. But if I do not write down these feelings, I will no longer be able to refer back to them, so I decided to summon some courage and write this personal essay.
Ruby Is Not Object-Oriented Enough Either The incompleteness I feel in Ruby is that many operations lack reversibility. You can define a variable, but it is difficult to cleanly delete it. There is for modules, but there is no . Mechanisms such as , , , , and do exist, but there does not seem to be a consistent reversible model for taking methods or behavior out of one structure and safely transplanting them into another object structure.Ruby is considered a dynamic language, and it permits all kinds of changes at runtime. But that freedom seems to work strongly in the direction of “adding things later.” The freedom to remove what has been added, to decompose structures and reassemble them into another form, or to undo such changes, does not seem to have been systematized very much.Perhaps Ruby does not have enough of the qualities of a dynamic language.Ideally, I think it would be interesting if there were a Ruby implementation that, like machine learning, could be given input data and expected output, and then explore at the meta-level, at runtime, how to optimize its object structure. As a foundation for that, I imagine it would need mechanisms that allow it to observe, transform, and reconstruct its own objects. Although I do not know whether such a thing is truly possible.Even if something like that were realized, in practice it might end up being separated into two stages: “generation of object structures through learning or compilation,” and then “execution.” I feel that would be rather boring.
What I Hope to See from Ruby I am deeply absorbed in Crystal, and have drifted a little away from Ruby. There are several people like that. Seeing this, it would not be strange if some people thought Ruby should also become capable of doing more Crystal-like things.But what is actually needed is the opposite. Crystal has structural constraints that it simply cannot escape. Crystal is a language that achieves speed and low memory usage by placing strong constraints on Ruby. Since I am a Crystal believer, I think that if you want to make a language do Crystal-like things, Crystal is better at that. There is nothing interesting about Ruby trying to do the same thing. I want to see what only Ruby can do.Ruby is, compared with Crystal, a language used in industry, so I think there are ways in which it cannot move freely. A language that can freely transform the structure of objects at runtime would be dangerous and would probably not be welcomed by industry. Still, isn’t it strange that, among mainstream languages, Ruby is treated almost as if it were the most dynamic language? I cannot shake the feeling that there remains a vast frontier in the world of languages even more dynamic than Ruby.I hope that someday I will see an attempt to expand the very world of programming itself into an even more dynamic realm.This post was machine-translated from Japanese into English using ChatGPT.

item.title: Porting Libraries to Crystal with AI
item.author: kojix2
item.content:encoded:
This post was originally written in Japanese and translated into English by the author using ChatGPT. The original post is available here.AI coding tools have become much better, and I now write code by hand far less often than before. I use GitHub Copilot in VSCode through the OSS benefit program, and recently I have also been trying Claude Code and Codex.
Porting libraries to the Crystal language Compared with other programming languages, Crystal does not have a very large library ecosystem.However, many open source libraries have licenses that allow porting, and AI can provide a lot of help with porting work. Because of this, when a library is missing, it is becoming realistic to consider porting as an option.In this article, I want to put into words and record what I actually do when porting libraries.
Choosing a reference library The first step is to choose the library to use as a reference.In Crystal, compared with C or Go, a higher level of abstraction is often expected. On the other hand, Crystal cannot use metaprogramming as freely as Ruby or Python.In that sense, Crystal is a language somewhere in the middle, and it is not always possible to choose a single reference library. Sometimes it is necessary to look at multiple libraries and think about what would be best. In my case, I often look at active Rust and Go projects, while using Ruby and Python APIs as references. When the reference is written in Rust, binding to it may sometimes be better than porting it.That kind of separation is the first step. If I decide that porting is the right approach, I move on. There may also be cases where porting and bindings are mixed.The most important point is the license. I check whether the original library is under a license that allows porting, such as MIT, BSD, Apache-2.0, or another license whose conditions I can comply with. I try to make the new library inherit the license terms of the original.I also clearly state where the original project came from. In my case, I add the reference repository as a whole using . This also fixes the version of the code that Coding Agents refer to. It helps avoid unnecessary misunderstandings and trouble.When creating a final "tool", it may be reasonable to have multiple reference sources. But when creating a "library" by porting or binding, I think it is easier to maintain the project later if the main reference source is kept to one.
Making an overall plan with the web version of ChatGPT First, I upload an archive of the source library, either a tarball or a zip file, to ChatGPT and ask for an overall policy for porting the whole library to Crystal. I upload an archive simply because there is a limit on the number of files that can be uploaded.Why do I start with the web version of ChatGPT instead of a Coding Agent?The reason is based on experience: I tend to get better results when I first discuss the whole thing with the web version. This is only a guess, but I think there are probably two reasons.The first is the efficient use of internet search. Compared with local Coding Agents, the web version of ChatGPT is better at search. It can look through websites, technical blogs, and GitHub, and explore the policy from a wider point of view. When something is vague or unknown, it can search on its own and refine the plan.The second reason is probably that the cloud environment has more efficient access to documentation. Compared with searching a codebase locally while spending tokens, searching code in the cloud seems to work better, at least in my experience.Once the overall policy is produced, I ask additional questions about unclear points or my own requirements. At this stage, it may be useful to limit the amount of information by saying something like, "Please answer in three lines or less," so that ChatGPT's responses do not become too long or go off on a tangent.When building a Crystal library as a binding to a static language such as C, C++, or Rust, it is important to discuss the boundary of the binding, the build system, and the infrastructure, and to make sure the understanding is aligned.The desirable Crystal API design is often different from the language of the original library, such as Rust or Go. In such cases, I may also upload Ruby libraries as reference material and ask what kind of API would be desirable. However, Crystal is not Ruby, so simply making the API the same as Ruby is not necessarily the right answer. If I really want to make something good, I have to check it myself.Once the architecture and design are agreed on, I ask ChatGPT to write it down as a self-contained and executable plan, usually in a file such as . I often have written in Japanese so that I can read it easily.However, may contain rough notes, wrong assumptions, or unorganized working context. For that reason, I usually do not publish this file as-is. Instead, I try to preserve important design decisions and caveats in a form that can be read later, such as in the README, issues, or commit messages.That said, if the tool is not just for myself and I want many people to use it, I may ask for to be written in English from the beginning.
Doing the porting work locally Because I want to make use of Copilot's free quota, I use VSCode locally. Recently, however, CLI agents have also become more capable, and it is becoming possible to use editors of one's choice, such as Zed.First, I initialize the project repository.I decide the Crystal project name, create a skeleton with , add the reference repository as a submodule, and place in the repository.I still do not know whether should be made more like a TODO list.I do not want to lose the work, so I create a new private repository on GitHub and prepare to push the project there. After that, I ask the Coding Agent to proceed with the project while looking at .During the work cycle, I periodically run for formatting and for tests.In my case, I run the linter, , by myself later, and then pass the result to the Agent and ask it to fix the issues in a batch.I also periodically ask it to review the plan, update it, or delete parts that have been completed.Coding agents make rapid progress at first, but at some point they often start taking very small steps, and the work stops moving forward.In such cases, I stop the agent for a while and ask questions such as: "What is the current problem?", "Are there places that should be refactored before continuing?", "Is there anything unrealistic in the plan itself?", or "Is there anything you want me to do, such as setting up the environment?"In some cases, I make a tarball of the current state, upload it to ChatGPT again, ask it to evaluate the whole situation from a broader perspective, and have it create .However, this kind of workflow is only possible because I am working alone and will eventually publish everything on GitHub. I do not think this is a possible workflow when multiple people are coding for work.
Writing tests with fixtures Some reference libraries provide fixtures for tests. When the original repository is added as a submodule, those fixtures can also be referenced, so they can be used in the Crystal-side tests as well.However, my honest impression is that aiming for parity is not easy, because of differences caused by floating point errors, random numbers, race conditions, and so on.To absorb differences in random numbers, one possible method is to prepare a small piece of code in the original language that generates random numbers, save those generated numbers as a kind of fixture in JSON or another format, and use those values in Crystal tests. This method does not always work, but there are cases where it does.Once the project has taken some shape, I add several GitHub Actions workflows. for generating documentation for building and releasing CLI tools, or Renovate, for updating GitHub ActionsI end up adding these almost every time. In my case, I have a toy project called lolcat.cr, and I often copy workflows from it and then modify them.After adding them, I adjust things until the tests and builds pass, and then add badges to the README.This depends on the purpose. In my case, most of the AI-ported libraries I create are for my own use. Compared with the time when I wrote libraries by hand, my feeling has changed a little: I do not really think that I want the library to become widely used. Maybe I instinctively want to avoid losing time to maintenance or spending more money on tokens.If README.md is too decorated, it starts to look like it was made by AI. A project with a gorgeous README but no maintenance feels, to me, like the ruins of a theme park with no afterglow. It does not leave a good impression.So I usually ask for README.md to be written in a "simple, plain, and purely practical" style.
Deciding the granularity of commits As a general principle, in order to run a trustworthy project, it is desirable to avoid and leave a transparent commit log. This is especially true when developing together in an open source community. Through pull requests and reviews, you can interact with people around the world and come to know what kind of people they are. I think this is one of the pleasures of participating in an open source community.However, best practices for Git workflows in solo personal development that depends heavily on AI have not yet been established. It is necessary to record why a certain piece of code was included, but I think it is better to lean on Git than to attach a separate memory system only for AI.That said, Git is chronological. When reordering commits, even if the final state of the code is the same, becomes necessary. In the AI era, I feel that we may need a version control method based on semantics, one that can rebase without depending so strongly on chronological order.For now, personally, I ask AI to write commit messages, and then I manually commit them myself.I think this works as a minimal check to confirm that the human goal and the AI's work target are aligned. But there is also criticism that this is laundering or hiding AI-written code as if it had been written by a human, and I do not think it can be called a best practice.Embarrassingly, I also use a lot.Especially in the early stage of a private repository where I am progressing through a plan, I repeatedly use and , effectively using Git as a kind of "overwrite save" without leaving much history.Of course, this is mainly about private repositories before publication. The same thing should not be done on a shared public branch.What I have written here reflects the situation as of April 2026.I hope that when I reread this later, I will be able to think, "So that was what things were like at that time."Coding Agents have made it possible to ask for explanations of algorithms and ideas that were previously difficult to understand, at any desired level of detail. They have also made it easy to quickly implement and try out ideas that come to mind. This really is revolutionary.At the same time, I sometimes get too absorbed in AI coding, work for too many hours, and feel that it may harm my health. I think I need to be a little careful about that. Health comes first.At the beginning, I wrote that this article was written by hand, not by AI. Note added for the English version: This refers to the original Japanese version. This English translation was made with ChatGPT.I wrote that on purpose because these days I often generate text with AI too, and I wanted to deliberately do something different this time.That is all for this article.
